---
title: "12 Diagnostic Prediction Model Construction"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(randomForest)
library(e1071)
library(xgboost)
library(pROC)

# Global Parameters
train_ratio <- 0.7

# Data Import
# Import core gene expression dataset and grouping labels

# Data Analysis
# 1. Feature gene selection via LASSO regression
# 2. 7:3 train/test dataset division
# 3. Multi-model construction (Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost)
# 4. Model evaluation via AUC, calibration curve and decision curve

# Visualization
# ROC curve, calibration plot, decision curve plot

# Result Export
# Output model files and evaluation index table

# Result Description
# Explain feature selection rules and multi-dimensional model evaluation criteria
